summary: The diff shows modifications to AttackOnTitanGallery.tsx and supporting files, but there is no evidence that the actual image file (attack-on-titan-shirt.dim_800x1000.png) was regenerated or replaced. The component code references the same image path as before, and no new image asset appears in the added files list.

missing_requirements.requirement: Regenerate and reload the Attack on Titan T-shirt image used in the AttackOnTitanGallery component to refresh the static asset with an updated version.
missing_requirements.reason: No image file was added or replaced in the diff. The 'ADDED FILES' section shows 'none', meaning the static asset attack-on-titan-shirt.dim_800x1000.png was not updated. The component still references the same path but the actual image binary was not regenerated or replaced.
